name: env_loader — OPENAI_API_KEY loads from .env when no ambient key is set
description: Stage 13.8-5 regression guard. Verifies that loadDotEnv() reads OPENAI_API_KEY from a .env file and sets process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY when no ambient value is present. RED (before 13.8-6): env_loader.js does not exist → key_loaded false. GREEN (after 13.8-6): key loaded correctly.
